title: WOS API Pagination
description: Cursor pagination primitives for the public WOS REST API. The public contract uses opaque cursors and hasMore instead of page numbers or totals so append-only lists remain stable under concurrent writes.

CursorToken.description: Opaque server-issued token for resuming a cursor-paginated list. Clients MUST NOT parse, persist across sessions, or share it across users.

PageLimit.description: Requested page size. Servers MAY apply a lower per-resource maximum but MUST reject values above 200.

PaginationQuery.description: Common cursor pagination query fields used by list endpoints.

cursor.description: Opaque resume token returned by the previous page. Omit on the first request.

limit.description: Maximum number of items requested for this page.

PaginatedResult.description: Cursor pagination envelope. Resource schemas specialize the item type in their own page definitions.

items.description: Page items. Resource-specific schemas narrow this array's item type.

cursor.description: Opaque token for the next page. Omitted when hasMore is false.

hasMore.description: True when another page is available from the server.
